about.title: About
about.greet: Hi, nice to have you here!
about.presentation: I am a Full Stack Software Developer with over 3 years of experience. I deliver clean code, robust architectures, and responsive interfaces. My skills cover professional websites, SaaS solutions, secure APIs, and integration with various databases. My goal is to deliver reliable, efficient, and user-friendly software.
about.statsAlt: Most present languages in my GitHub repositories

educationList.title: Systems Analysis and Development
educationList.description: Higher Technology Course in Computer Systems Analysis from Salvador University.

educationList.title: Civil Engineering
educationList.description: Bachelor of Civil Engineering from the Federal University of Bahia.

experienceList.title: Software Developer
experienceList.description: Full Stack Developer responsible for implementing new features, support, and bug fixes in a robust SaaS application. Working mainly with PHP and VueJs to ensure continuous product improvement.

experienceList.title: Partner and Commercial Director
experienceList.description: Responsible for managing commercial operations and active participation in technical coordination and project monitoring.

items.title: Website Creation
items.description: Institutional sites and landing pages optimized for performance and SEO.

items.title: API Integration
items.description: System connection through RESTful APIs and secure integrations between different platforms.

items.title: Databases
items.description: Modeling, implementation, and optimization of relational and non-relational databases.

items.title: Full Stack Development
items.description: Creation of modern, secure, and scalable applications, combining a robust back-end with responsive front-end.

items.title: DevOps & Deploy
items.description: Build, test, and deploy processes with Docker and CI/CD.

items.title: SaaS Solutions
items.description: Experience in the development and maintenance of multi-tenant SaaS systems for the market.

items.name: B2 Engenharia
items.description: Institutional website developed for B2 Engenharia. Design created in Figma and executed in VueJs 3.

items.name: Salus Ebook
items.description: Landing Page created for Salus Book to sell a digital book about migraines. Own design executed in VueJs 3.

items.name: IZI POS
items.description: Complete Point of Sale (POS) system focused on optimizing sales operations and financial management for a locksmith. Intuitive and responsive interface in Vue3, business rules and back-end architecture in Java + Spring Boot 3, and data persistence with PostgreSQL.
